summary: Full backend + frontend verification of Topchampion JWT admin console (iteration 3). Backend: 24/24 pytest cases passed (auth, role gates, project CRUD, file upload+delete, public lead). Frontend: CN default landing verified, full admin login -> dashboard -> create project -> detail -> edit route -> users CRUD -> role gating -> logout -> protection flow all PASS. No critical issues found.

minor.issue: PATCH uses the strict ProjectIn model so all fields without defaults (name) are required; sending a partial like {status:'archived'} returns 422. Not a bug per spec, but a true partial-update PATCH would normally use Optional fields. Frontend currently always sends full payload so it works in practice.

issues: Role value shown for the seeded admin is rendered as 'SYSTEM ADMINISTRATOR' all-caps in the welcome line and as the localized role badge — visually consistent but ensure the 'EN' toggle label vs current language label is unambiguous (it shows EN when CN is active, which is the standard pattern, kept as-is).

critical_code_review_comments: server.py PATCH /api/projects/{id} uses ProjectIn (name required). If true partial updates are desired later, introduce a ProjectUpdate model with all-Optional fields.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'). Consider migrating to lifespan context — runtime works but emits DeprecationWarning.

Admin password is read from .env on every startup and rewrites bcrypt hash if it doesn't match — fine for this app, but document that rotating ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env will silently change the admin password on the next restart.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=False is correct for the Bearer flow used here; do NOT enable credentials without restricting origins.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_* users and TEST_* projects and clean them up at the end via the zz_cleanup test and a manual cleanup pass. No leftover seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file is /app/backend/tests/test_admin_api.py (24 cases, pytest). Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. The admin auto-seeds with ADMIN_USERNAME/ADMIN_PASSWORD from /app/backend/.env on every startup (idempotent — rewrites hash if .env password changes). Project/User selects in the admin UI are native <select> elements, so Playwright must use page.select_option(value=...) — clicking option text fails because native <option> isn't a normal clickable. Default language is CN; sidebar lang toggle (data-testid=admin-lang-toggle) flips CN<->EN.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA. Initial Playwright run had script-side issues using locator.click on native <option> elements (which Chromium doesn't dispatch as user clicks); resolved by switching to page.select_option(value=...). All re-tested flows passed.
